topics.query_en: Resource allocation graph multiple instances deadlock cycle
topics.query_ar: شرح Resource Allocation Graph نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: While single-instance RAGs are simple, detecting deadlocks in multi-instance graphs requires understanding that a cycle does not necessarily imply a deadlock.

topics.query_en: Deadlock prevention operating system mutual exclusion hold and wait
topics.reason: Understanding the practical implementation of breaking the four necessary conditions without causing severe system performance penalties is conceptually difficult.

topics.query_ar: شرح Deadlock detection algorithm نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: Students often confuse the detection algorithm with Banker's algorithm, struggling to understand why detection uses a Request matrix instead of a Max matrix.
